brief: 참참참 미니게임 로비 아이콘. 한국 예능식 대결 구도에서 두 픽셀 캐릭터가 좌우 방향 손짓으로 공격/회피를 겨루는 코믹한 순간
style: 16-bit pixel art, Korean retro comedic vibe, energetic casual arcade look, vivid contrast, clean 1:1 app icon composition, no text

history.generationPrompt: Create an app icon depicting a lobby scene for the mini-game 'Chum Chum Chum'. Showcase two pixelated characters engaging in a comedic face-off typical of Korean variety shows, using dynamic left and right hand gestures to attack and evade. Emphasize a retro comedic vibe in a 16-bit pixel art style, ensuring vivid contrast and energetic, casual arcade aesthetics. The composition should be a clean 1:1 icon format with no text.
history.makerChangeSummary: The prompt specifies an app icon, emphasizing energetic gestures and comedic elements fitting the Korean variety show theme, all within a retro 16-bit pixel art style, ensuring clarity for production needs.

strengths: Excellent 16-bit pixel art execution with clean lines and vibrant colors.
Captures the energetic 'Korean variety show' vibe perfectly through character expressions (sweat, determination) and effect icons.
Composition is balanced and highly readable as an app icon.
issues: The gameplay depiction is inaccurate to the brief. It shows a physical punch hitting a shield (fighting mechanic), whereas 'Cham Cham Cham' specifically involves directional hand pointing and head turning.
The requested 'left/right hand gestures' are replaced by a direct attack/block interaction.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: Create an app icon for 'Cham Cham Cham' mini-game. 16-bit pixel art style. Two characters in a comedic face-off. The attacking character extends a large hand with a pointing finger indicating a direction (left or right), while the defending character comically turns their head the opposite way to evade. Emphasize the directional guessing mechanic rather than physical impact. Vivid colors, high contrast, clean distinct outlines, Korean variety show vibe, no text.

history.generationPrompt: Create an app icon for the 'Cham Cham Cham' mini-game. Use a 16-bit pixel art style featuring two characters in a comedic face-off. The attacking character should prominently extend a large, pixelated hand with an exaggerated pointing finger indicating either left or right. The defending character should humorously turn their head in the opposite direction, showcasing the guessing mechanic. Ensure vivid colors, high contrast, and clean, distinct outlines that reflect a Korean variety show vibe. The composition should be a clear 1:1 icon format with no text.
history.makerChangeSummary: The prompt now accurately depicts the 'Cham Cham Cham' gameplay by focusing on the directional hand gestures and corresponding head movements, correcting the previous issue of showing a physical fight interaction.

strengths: The visual style perfectly captures the requested 'Korean retro comedic vibe' with vibrant colors and expressive 16-bit character designs.
High contrast and clean composition make it effective as a small mobile app icon.
The attacker's exaggerated hand gesture is clear and energetic.
issues: The core gameplay mechanic is misrepresented. The brief asked for the defender to 'turn their head', which is the essence of 'Cham Cham Cham'. Currently, the defender is facing forward/standing still, making it look like a scolding scene rather than a dodging game.
The interaction lacks the specific directional dynamism (left vs right) required for the game logic.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: 16-bit pixel art app icon for 'Cham Cham Cham'. A comedic face-off. The attacking character on the left points a giant finger sharply to the RIGHT. The defending character on the right frantically turns their head completely to the LEFT (showing side profile) to dodge. Exaggerated motion, sweat drops, vivid arcade colors, energetic background rays. No text, clear 1:1 composition.

history.generationPrompt: Create a 16-bit pixel art app icon for the 'Cham Cham Cham' mini-game, emphasizing dynamic interaction. The attacker, positioned on the left, prominently extends a giant finger pointing sharply to the RIGHT. The defender, on the right, dramatically turns their head fully to the LEFT, showing a side profile to dodge the attack. Include exaggerated motion lines, sweat drops, and energetic background rays to enhance the comedic and vibrant arcade feeling. Use vivid colors with a Korean retro comedic vibe. Ensure the composition is a clear 1:1 format with no text.
history.makerChangeSummary: The prompt clarifies the directionality in character positioning and actions to accurately reflect the game's core mechanics, specifically addressing the feedback regarding the defender's head turn. It emphasizes dynamic motion and energetic background elements, ensuring the comedic and vivid nature of the theme is captured effectively.

strengths: The exaggerated perspective of the pointing finger creates a dynamic and engaging focal point perfect for an app icon.
The facial expressions and sweat drops capture the 'Korean retro comedic vibe' and arcade energy excellently.
Color contrast is vivid and the pixel art technique is clean and readable.
issues: The defender's pose does not fully match the prompt's instruction for a 'side profile turning left'. The character is mostly front-facing and looking shocked, rather than clearly turning their head to indicate the directional gameplay mechanic.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: Create a 16-bit pixel art app icon for 'Cham Cham Cham'. Action: Left character points a giant finger sharply to the RIGHT. The Right character (defender) has whipped their head completely to the LEFT, showing a clear SIDE PROFILE face to dodge the finger. The defender's face should look towards the left edge of the frame. Background: bright comedic speed lines and impact effects. Style: vibrant Korean retro arcade, exaggerated expressions, clean lines, no text.
